data.description: US AND EU PLAN $800B UKRAINE REBUILD FUND The US and EU are weighing an $800 billion public-private fund to rebuild Ukraine after the war, according to Politico. A joint 10-year plan aims to support recovery and pave the way for EU membership. The proposal includes $500 billion

data.title: iRobot emerges from Chapter 11, creates subsidiary iRobot Safe focused on data protection. (Character count: 94)
data.description: A prominent consumer robotics leader, iRobot Corporation, has successfully emerged from Chapter 11 bankruptcy as a stronger company based in Boston. The company has established an independent U.S. subsidiary called iRobot Safe, focusing on data protection and governance. This development was announced on January 23, 2026, in Bedford, Massachusetts.

data.title: Eimskip's Nomination Committee aids in board succession planning, nominating candidates for the Board and its committees.
data.description: The Nomination Committee, a sub-committee of the Board of Directors, aids the Board in Board succession planning, and identifying and nominating Board candidates, alternate Board candidates, and committee members.

data.title: ATOM Group partners with Don Perry for ATOM Distribution launch in the US. Deal signed on Jan 22, 2026.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy prepares for winter weather with 3,300 electric workers and 700 gas workers staged in Southeast Texas. State declares disaster.
data.description: With around 3,300 CenterPoint electric staff and contractors positioned for storm readiness and potential restoration tasks in Southeast Texas, alongside about 700 natural gas workers and contractors aiding in the response, the State of Texas has declared a disaster.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers of fire and CO risks in winter; crucial tips for using generators, furnaces, and heaters.
data.description: In response to an upcoming winter storm in the United States, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has cautioned consumers about the dangers of fires and carbon monoxide (CO) poisoning. With temperatures decreasing, there is heightened concern for safety as many prepare for the severe weather. The CPSC emphasizes the importance of preventative measures to avoid incidents related to fires and CO poisoning during this time.

data.title: BW LPG Limited, registered in Singapore and listed on OSE and NYSE, granted waiver from Singapore Code on Takeovers, subject to U.S. and Norwegian rules.
data.description: Singapore-based BW LPG Limited, registered and listed on Euronext Oslo Børs and the New York Stock Exchange, falls under the jurisdiction of Singapore, U.S., and Norwegian takeover regulations. The company, with OSE ticker code "BWLPG" and NYSE ticker code "BWLP," has received an exemption from the Singapore Code on Takeovers and Mergers. Consequently, BW LPG is currently subject to U.S. and Norwegian regulations.

data.title: NOVAGOLD boosts earlier bought deal financing to $300M.
data.description: The latest statistics reveal that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, with over 6 million new jobs created in the past year. Additionally, the stock market has seen a record increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. In other economic news, inflation remains steady at 2.5%, and wages have seen a modest increase of 2.8% on average. These indicators suggest a positive trend in the country's economy, despite ongoing global challenges.

data.title: Evofem CEO advocates for a "Ground-Up Reset" of Women's Health at Fierce JPM Week 2026. Replay available at fiercejpmweek.com.
data.description: CEO of Evofem delivered an impassioned keynote address at the Fierce JPM Week 2026 in San Diego, urging for a comprehensive overhaul of women's health initiatives. The speech, described as "fiery," emphasized the need for a "Ground-Up Reset." The replay of the address is currently available on the event's website, fiercejpmweek.com.

data.title: LHV Group buys own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 16-22.01.2026.
data.description: LHV Group has reported the acquisition of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange within the timeframe of 16-22 January 2026.
